arts.ttl: Newcastle United rival Aston Villa for dream signing of Manchester City star
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly one of the clubs keen on a potential summer transfer window swoop for Manchester City star Jack Grealish. The England international has fallen down the pecking order in Pep Guardiola’s side in recent times, and it seems he’s now facing an uncertain future.
